title: Agents
subtitle: When adding a new Agent, KTClaw will copy the main Agent's workspace files and runtime auth setup. The configuration can be modified through a dialog.
gatewayWarning: Gateway service is not running. Agent/channel changes may take a moment to apply.

createDialog.title: Add Agent
createDialog.description: Create a new agent by name. KTClaw will copy the main agent's workspace bootstrap files and runtime auth setup.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Agent
deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}" from KTClaw? This permanently deletes the agent and its KTClaw-managed workspace, runtime, and session files from disk.

settingsDialog.title: {{name}} Settings
settingsDialog.description: Update the agent name and manage which channels belong to this agent.
settingsDialog.channelsDescription: Each channel type has a single KTClaw configuration. Saving a configured channel here moves ownership to this agent.
settingsDialog.noChannels: No channels are assigned to this agent yet.

detail.title: Agent Detail
detail.notFoundDescription: The requested agent does not exist in the current KTClaw snapshot.
detail.rootSummary: This is the root KTClaw agent.
detail.teamSettingsDescription: Define whether this agent leads the team, can be directly contacted, and what work it is responsible for.
detail.teamRoleLeaderHint: Leaders act as the main user-facing coordinator for a team.
detail.teamRoleWorkerHint: Workers focus on execution and can be routed through a leader.
detail.chatAccessDirectHint: Users can open a conversation with this agent directly.
detail.chatAccessLeaderOnlyHint: This agent is blocked from normal direct chat and should be contacted through its leader.
detail.noCronJobs: No cron jobs associated with this agent.

removeChannelDialog.title: Remove Channel
removeChannelDialog.message: Remove {{name}} from KTClaw? This deletes the current channel configuration.
